@@@ tests/fixtures/fixture_kotlin.kt | kotlin - @brief Comprehensive Kotlin test fixture for parser validation. - @details Covers extension functions, inline/reified generics, DSL builders, delegation, coroutine scope, destructuring, sealed interfaces, value classes, operator overloading, and lateinit. ### IMPORT: `kotlin.collections.List` > Lines: 11-11 ``` import kotlin.collections.List ``` ### IMPORT: `kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow` > Lines: 12-12 ``` import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow ``` ### IMPORT: `kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow` > Lines: 13-13 ``` import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.flow ``` ### DECORATOR: `Deprecated` > Lines: 18-18 - @brief Marks a class or function as deprecated with migration path. */ ``` @Deprecated("Use UserV2 instead", replaceWith = ReplaceWith("UserV2")) ``` ### CLASS: `User` > Signature: `data class User(val name: String, val age: Int = 0)` > Lines: 19-61 ``` data class User(val name: String, val age: Int = 0) sealed class Result { data class Success(val value: T) : Result() data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result() object Loading : Result() fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } } ``` ### CLASS: `Result` > Signature: `sealed class Result` > Lines: 28-61 - @brief Sealed class representing success/failure outcomes. @tparam T The success value type. - @brief Successful outcome holding a value. - @param value The result data. ``` sealed class Result { data class Success(val value: T) : Result() data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result() object Loading : Result() fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } } ``` ### CLASS: `Success` > Signature: `data class Success(val value: T) : Result()` > Lines: 34-60 - @brief Successful outcome holding a value. - @brief Failed outcome holding an error message. - @param value The result data. - @param message Description of the failure. - @param cause Optional underlying exception. ``` data class Success(val value: T) : Result() data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result() object Loading : Result() fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } ``` ### CLASS: `Error` > Signature: `data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result()` > Lines: 42-60 - @brief Failed outcome holding an error message. - @brief Singleton state representing an in-progress operation. - @param message Description of the failure. - @param cause Optional underlying exception. ``` data class Error(val message: String, val cause: Throwable? = null) : Result() object Loading : Result() fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } ``` ### MODULE: `Loading` > Signature: `object Loading : Result()` > Lines: 48-60 - @brief Singleton state representing an in-progress operation. - @brief Map the success value using a transform function. @tparam R The target type after transformation. - @param transform Function converting T to R. - @return Transformed Result or original error/loading state. ``` object Loading : Result() fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } ``` ### FUNCTION: `map` > Signature: `fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this)` > Lines: 56-60 - @brief Map the success value using a transform function. @tparam R The target type after transformation. - @param transform Function converting T to R. - @return Transformed Result or original error/loading state. ``` fun map(transform: (T) -> R): Result = when (this) { is Success -> Success(transform(value)) is Error -> Error(message, cause) is Loading -> Loading } ``` ### INTERFACE: `Repository` > Signature: `interface Repository` > Lines: 70-90 - @brief Generic CRUD repository interface. @tparam T Entity type managed by this repository. - @brief Find an entity by its unique identifier. - @param id Entity ID. - @return The entity or null if not found. ``` interface Repository { fun findById(id: Int): T? fun save(entity: T): Boolean fun findAll(): Flow } ``` ### FUNCTION: `findById` > Signature: `fun findById(id: Int): T?` > Lines: 76-96 - @brief Find an entity by its unique identifier. - @brief Persist an entity. - @param id Entity ID. - @param entity The entity to save. - @return The entity or null if not found. - @return True if save succeeded. ``` fun findById(id: Int): T? fun save(entity: T): Boolean fun findAll(): Flow } sealed interface Identifiable { ``` ### FUNCTION: `save` > Signature: `fun save(entity: T): Boolean` > Lines: 83-96 - @brief Persist an entity. - @brief Retrieve all entities as a Flow stream. - @param entity The entity to save. - @return True if save succeeded. - @return Flow emitting all stored entities. ``` fun save(entity: T): Boolean fun findAll(): Flow } sealed interface Identifiable { ``` ### FUNCTION: `findAll` > Signature: `fun findAll(): Flow` > Lines: 89-96 - @brief Retrieve all entities as a Flow stream. - @brief Sealed interface requiring an ID property. - @return Flow emitting all stored entities. ``` fun findAll(): Flow } sealed interface Identifiable { ``` ### CONSTANT: `id` > Signature: `val id: Int` > Lines: 98-98 - @brief Blue color channel. */ - @brief Parse a color from its hex string. - @param hex Hex color code including '#' prefix. - @return Matching Color or null. ``` companion object { fun fromHex(hex: String): Color? = values().find { it.hex == hex } } ``` ### FUNCTION: `fromHex` > Signature: `fun fromHex(hex: String): Color? = values().find { it.hex == hex }` > Lines: 121-121 - @brief Parse a color from its hex string. - @param hex Hex color code including '#' prefix. - @return Matching Color or null. ``` fun fromHex(hex: String): Color? = values().find { it.hex == hex } ``` ### CLASS: `Entity` > Signature: `data class Entity(` > Lines: 134-155 - @brief Data class combining Identifiable with named properties. - @param id Unique identifier. - @param name Entity display name. - @param status Current lifecycle status. ``` data class Entity( override val id: Int, val name: String, val status: String = "active", ) : Identifiable @JvmInline value class EmailAddress(val value: String) { init { require(value.contains('@')) { "Invalid email: $value" } } val domain: String get() = value.substringAfter('@') } ``` ### CONSTANT: `name` > Signature: `val name: String,` > Lines: 136-136 ``` val name: String, ``` ### CONSTANT: `status` > Signature: `val status: String = "active",` > Lines: 137-137 ``` val status: String = "active", ``` ### DECORATOR: `JvmInline` > Lines: 147-147 - @brief Extract the domain part of the email. */ ``` val domain: String get() = value.substringAfter('@') ``` ### FUNCTION: `greet` > Signature: `fun greet(name: String): String` > Lines: 165-167 - @brief Greet a person by name. - @param name The person's name. - @return Greeting message string. ``` fun greet(name: String): String { return "Hello $name" } ``` ### FUNCTION: `fetchData` > Signature: `suspend fun fetchData(): String` > Lines: 174-177 - @brief Suspend function simulating async data retrieval. - @return Retrieved data as a string. ``` suspend fun fetchData(): String { return "data" } ``` ### FUNCTION: `processItems` > Signature: `fun processItems(items: List, transform: (String) -> String): List` > Lines: 186-188 - @brief Higher-order function with trailing lambda syntax. - @param items List of strings to process. - @param transform Function applied to each item. - @return List of transformed results. ``` fun processItems(items: List, transform: (String) -> String): List { return items.map(transform) } ``` ### CONSTANT: `String` > Signature: `val String.lastChar: Char?` > Lines: 205-205 - @brief Extension property returning the last character or null. @receiver String The string to inspect. ``` val String.lastChar: Char? ``` ### CLASS: `Vector2` > Signature: `data class Vector2(val x: Double, val y: Double)` > Lines: 229-249 - @brief 2D vector with operator overloading for arithmetic. - @brief Add two vectors component-wise. - @param x Horizontal component. - @param y Vertical component. - @param other The vector to add. - @return Resulting sum vector. ``` data class Vector2(val x: Double, val y: Double) { operator fun plus(other: Vector2) = Vector2(x + other.x, y + other.y) operator fun unaryMinus() = Vector2(-x, -y) operator fun times(other: Vector2) = x * other.x + y * other.y } ``` ### CONSTANT: `PI` > Signature: `val PI = 3.14159265` > Lines: 254-254 - @brief Mathematical constant Pi. */ ``` val PI = 3.14159265 ``` ### VARIABLE: `counter` > Signature: `var counter = 0` > Lines: 257-257 - @brief Mutable package-level counter. */ ``` var counter = 0 ``` ### MODULE: `Singleton` > Signature: `object Singleton` > Lines: 265-286 - @brief Application-wide singleton for configuration management. - @brief Mutable configuration map. ``` object Singleton { private val config = mutableMapOf() fun set(key: String, value: Any) { config[key] = value } @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST") fun get(key: String): T? = config[key] as? T } ``` ### FUNCTION: `set` > Signature: `fun set(key: String, value: Any)` > Lines: 274-276 - @brief Store a configuration value. - @param key Configuration key. - @param value Configuration value. ``` fun set(key: String, value: Any) { config[key] = value } ``` ### DECORATOR: `Suppress` > Lines: 284-284 - @brief Retrieve a typed configuration value. @tparam T Expected value type. - @param key Configuration key. - @return The value cast to T, or null. ``` @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST") ``` ### FUNCTION: `get` > Signature: `fun get(key: String): T? = config[key] as? T` > Lines: 285-292 - @brief Companion object pattern for factory construction. ``` fun get(key: String): T? = config[key] as? @brief List implementation delegating to an inner mutable list. @tparam T Element type. - @brief Count of accesses to the delegated list. - @param inner The backing list. ``` class DelegatingList(private val inner: MutableList) : List by inner { var accessCount = 0 private set override val size: Int get() { accessCount++ return inner.size } } ``` ### VARIABLE: `accessCount` > Signature: `var accessCount = 0` > Lines: 305-305 -
